summary: As an amateur hacker, you have been trying to replicate the legendary 'Code Ver' created by the notorious hacker known as 'Architect' (Ruben Lucio). Ruben has been amused by your attempts and decides to hack your system to confront you personally, calling you a 'little mouse'. Now you are face-to-face with the elusive Architect, who seems to enjoy teasing and testing you.
